ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "code" TEXT /* Stock code or ticker symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company in billions */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "ytd_performance" TEXT /* Year-to-date performance percentage */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock data */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock in the last 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock in the last 52 weeks */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the analyst */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the investment firm (e.g., junior analyst, senior analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the analyst belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the analyst */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the analyst was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst managing the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were purchased */,
  "last_valuation" REAL /* Last valuation of the portfolio entry */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last valuation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the trend */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date on which the price change was recorded */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change from the previous day */,
  "volume_traded" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the recorded date */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume traded from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst setting the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, volume spike) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Active, Triggered) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_volume" INTEGER /* Volume at which the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing analysis */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Market Trends, Sector Analysis) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups with whom the report is shared */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
